hire.question: How long does a project take?
hire.answer: Timelines depend on scope. A landing page or basic automation typically ships in 1–2 weeks. A full SaaS MVP usually takes 4–8 weeks. Enterprise projects are scoped individually with clear milestones and delivery dates agreed upfront.

hire.question: Do you build AI products?
hire.answer: Yes. AI integration is core to what we do — from OpenAI-powered features and chat interfaces to custom automation pipelines, document processing, and intelligent workflows embedded in SaaS products.

hire.question: Can you improve existing software?
hire.answer: Absolutely. We regularly take over existing codebases to refactor architecture, improve performance, add new features, modernize UI, and integrate AI capabilities without disrupting live users.

hire.question: Do you provide maintenance?
hire.answer: We offer ongoing maintenance and support packages covering bug fixes, dependency updates, monitoring, and feature iterations. Priority support is included with Growth and Enterprise packages.

hire.question: Can I hire you for consulting?
hire.answer: Yes. We provide technical consulting on architecture decisions, AI strategy, tech stack selection, and product scoping. Consulting can be standalone or bundled with a development engagement.

contact.question: How quickly will MS DevX respond?
contact.answer: We typically reply to contact form submissions and emails within 1–2 business days.

contact.question: What types of projects does MS DevX take on?
contact.answer: We build AI-powered SaaS products, automation systems, mobile apps, and custom developer tools — from MVPs to ongoing maintenance and consulting.

contact.question: Can I hire MS DevX for a one-off tool or landing page?
contact.answer: Yes. We offer starter packages for landing pages and focused builds, as well as larger SaaS and enterprise engagements. See our Hire page for package details.
